summary: Iteration 20 - Testing new features: Employee Reviews label, Customer Reviews tab, Gas expense category, Restaurant Settings, Logo Upload, and Install App page. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working.
passed_tests: POST /api/expenses with category='gas' - Creates gas expense
POST /api/upload/restaurant-logo - Endpoint exists and accepts uploads

employee_reviews_label.notes: Dashboard shows 'تقييم الموظفين' (Employee Reviews) instead of 'التقييمات' in quick actions

customer_reviews_tab.notes: Loyalty page (/loyalty) has two tabs: 'الأعضاء' (Members) and 'تقييمات العملاء' (Customer Reviews). Reviews display with star ratings, customer name, order number, and detailed ratings (food/service/speed)

customer_reviews_api.notes: GET /api/customer-reviews returns reviews list. POST /api/customer-reviews creates new review without authentication (for customers)

gas_expense_category.notes: Expenses page has 'غاز' (Gas) category with 🔥 icon in EXPENSE_CATEGORIES. API accepts category='gas' for expense creation

restaurant_settings.notes: Settings page has 'المطعم' tab with: اسم المطعم (عربي), اسم المطعم (إنجليزي), شعار المطعم (logo upload), and save button

restaurant_logo_upload.notes: POST /api/upload/restaurant-logo endpoint accepts image uploads and returns logo_url

install_app_page.notes: /install-app page (CustomerInstall.js) shows: logo, 'قائمة الطعام' title, install instructions for iOS/Android, and 'تصفح القائمة' button

critical_code_review_comments: All requested features are implemented and working correctly
Dashboard.js line 630 shows 'تقييم الموظفين' label for reviews quick action
Loyalty.js has tabs for members and customer reviews with proper API integration
Expenses.js EXPENSE_CATEGORIES includes { id: 'gas', name: 'غاز', icon: '🔥' }
CustomerInstall.js provides PWA install page with iOS/Android instructions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 completed. All new features verified: 1) Dashboard shows 'تقييم الموظفين' for employee reviews, 2) Loyalty page has 'تقييمات العملاء' tab showing customer reviews with ratings, 3) Expenses has 'غاز' (gas) category, 4) Settings has 'المطعم' tab with restaurant name (Arabic/English) and logo upload, 5) /install-app page provides PWA installation instructions. APIs: /api/customer-reviews (GET/POST), /api/settings/restaurant (GET/PUT), /api/upload/restaurant-logo (POST).
